title: Alberta premier announces new Crown corporation to oversee province's rainy day fund
author: Lisa Johnson
notes: Heritage Fund Opportunities Corp announced Jan 29 2025. Goal: grow fund to $250B by 2050. Also confirms: (1) AIMCo CEO and board sacked November 2024; (2) former PM Stephen Harper appointed AIMCo chairman weeks after. Fund at $23.4B as of Sept 2024 + $2B new deposit. Anchors EVT-067.
